question: Who met you in New York?
answer:
My sister Afifa, who is older than me, her husband Kamal, and their son Niaz all came to the New York airport to pick us up. It was so much fun. 

The first thing I remember is that they bought us Burger King. My husband liked it, but I didn't like it because it wasn't cooked very well. It was actually bloody. I said then that I would never eat Burger King again.
